title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hero MotoCorp

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hero MotoCorp
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!
